prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFHPL-STD-GRY Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness Handstand Poster Home Gym Workout Area Warmups Laminated Description: Learn how to do a perfect and safe handstand with the Productive Fitness Handstand Poster.

This poster was designed by professionals to help make sure you get your body into perfect alignment for a successful handstand. It features easy to follow steps that take you through the warm ups and progressions you need to confidently perform your first handstand. The three most important parts to doing a handstand are wrist flexibility, shoulder flexibility and core strength. Knowing what to focus on when upside down is incredibly important when performing handstands.

This poster will also teach you how to bail, which is getting out of a handstand safely. It measures 24" x 36" and is laminated, making it perfect for home gyms or fitness centers. Make sure to grab one of these posters before you attempt your first handstand. Search Terms: fitness poster health planner at home gym workout excercise information womens diet nutrition exercise dumbell bodyweight ball body weight stretching Features: - Handstand Poster Designed by Fitness Experts with University Degrees in Physiology & Kinetics - Size: 24" x 36" - Printed On Gloss Paper & Laminated for Durability - Learn How to Perform a Safe Handstand - Learn How to Get Out of Handstand Safely === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness Handstand Poster 24" x 36" Laminated

anthropic.title_differentiation: Expert-Designed, Safe Handstand Progressions, Wrist And Shoulder Flexibility Guide, Learn Safe Bail Technique
